ogTitle: Gledswood Hills vs Glen Allen: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gledswood Hills and Glen Allen.
heading: Gledswood Hills vs Glen Allen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gledswood Hills, New South Wales and Glen Allen, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Allen has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Gledswood Hills (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gledswood Hills or Glen Allen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gledswood Hills has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Glen Allen scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gledswood Hills scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Allen scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gledswood Hills or Glen Allen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Allen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
